title: pectis multiseta var. multiseta
intro: Pectis multiseta var. multiseta, also known as Mexican firecracker or firecracker weed, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pectis multiseta var. multiseta include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from minor cuts and scrapes. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
